title: GapAnalysis
description: Structured analysis of gaps in current knowledge, technology, and practice that the proposed project addresses. Produced by the gap_analyzer agent.

gap_landscape_summary.description: 3–5 sentence narrative of the overall gap landscape this project addresses

sub_type.description: studied-and-open = known problem, no solution yet; not-studied = problem exists but uninvestigated; solved-elsewhere-not-applied = solution exists in another domain

description.description: Clear, specific statement of what is missing

evidence_of_gap.description: source_ids that document the existence of this gap

severity.description: Impact of the gap on the field or on the target application

project_solution.description: How the proposed project addresses or fills this gap

addressed_in_section.description: Proposal section that should reference this gap (e.g. 'Section 1.1', 'Section 4.1b')

strategic_importance.description: Importance for scoring under this call's evaluation criteria (10 = highest)

competitor_risk.description: Any known project or publication that partially addresses this gap. Leave empty string if none.

top_gaps_for_proposal.description: Gap IDs ranked by strategic_importance (highest first) — writers should prioritise these

criterion_gap_mapping.description: Maps evaluation criterion IDs (from evaluation_matrix.json) to the gap_ids that support scoring under that criterion
